# multiplayer-question-card-game Development Guidelines

Auto-generated from all feature plans. Last updated: 2026-04-16

## Active Technologies
- In-memory game state on the server; no new persistent storage (002-endgame-stats-player-cap)

- TypeScript 6, Node.js 22+, React 19 + Express 5, Socket.IO 4, Vite 8, React Router 7, Vitest 3, `@kgs/game-rules` workspace package (001-privacy-twitch-chat-voting)

## Project Structure

```text
client/
server/
packages/
```

## Commands

pnpm test; pnpm lint; pnpm build

## Code Style

TypeScript 6, Node.js 22+, React 19: Follow standard conventions

## Recent Changes
- 002-endgame-stats-player-cap: Added TypeScript 6, Node.js 22+, React 19 + Express 5, Socket.IO 4, Vite 8, React Router 7, Vitest 3, `@kgs/game-rules`
